name: Ammunition of Slaying
description: This magic ammunition is meant to slay creatures of a particular type, which the DM chooses or determines randomly. If a creature of that type takes damage from the ammunition, the creature makes a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking an extra 6d10 Force damage on a failed save or half as much extra damage on a successful one. After dealing its extra damage to a creature, the ammunition becomes nonmagical.

effect.trigger: Creature of specified type takes damage from this ammunition
effect.after_effect: Ammunition becomes nonmagical after dealing extra damage

activation.description: The magic functions automatically when the ammunition hits a target of its creature type

determination_method: Roll 1d100 on creature type table or DM chooses
notes: The creature type is determined when the ammunition is created or found. It becomes nonmagical after delivering its extra damage, regardless of the save result.
